outlook_paragraph: CRGY shows elevated drilling activity with 12 active sites at decision date, 3.5 above the recent average, driven by 7 newly active pads—indicating fresh development momentum into Q1 2023. Despite only 20% exposure to the active segment, this drilling surge supports higher production expectations. With WTI averaging near $77.85 and realized prices at a slight discount, the deterministic revenue forecast reaches approximately $526.3M. Continuous activity on half of the active sites reinforces operational consistency within the core area.
